reference: Tailbone region pain is also called coccydynia. It may occur due to a fall or may occur without any trauma. Generally, it is painful during prolonged sitting or pushing stools. You should: one. Apply a sitz bath, where you immerse your whole pelvic region in a hot water tub for ten minutes twice daily. two. Use a donut-shaped pillow, which helps relieve the pressure on the coccyx, the tailbone. three. Drink plenty of water and consume a fibrous diet, so that your stool is not hard and it is easy to push during a bowel movement. four. Refer to a Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation physician with expertise in pain management. He can prescribe certain medications or perform a procedure called a ganglion impar block to relieve the pain.
text: Tailbone region pain is also called coccidinia. It may occur due to a fall or may occur without any trauma. Generally, it is painful during prolonged or pushing stools. You should, one, apply a sitz bath where you immerse your whole pelvic region in a hot water tub for 10 minutes twice daily. Two, donut-shaped pillow, which helps relieve the pressure on the coccyx, the tailbone. Three, drink plenty of water and consume a fibrous diet so that your stool is not hard and it is easy to push during a bowel movement. Four, refer to a physical medicine and rehabilitation physician with expertise in pain management. You can prescribe certain medications or perform a procedure called a ganglion IPR block to relieve the pain.
